title: taraxacum languidum
intro: Taraxacum languidum, also known as the dandelion, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum languidum lie in its roots and leaves, which are rich in antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, liver problems, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties. Taraxacum languidum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal supplements, capsule, and powder form.
